column2: 1. How many hours do you spend on your smartphone per day?
column3: 2. How frequently do you check your phone in a day (without any specific notification)?
column4: 3. How often do you use your smartphone during study or class hours?
column5: 4. How much time do you spend on entertainment or non-productive apps per day (e.g., games, streaming, social media)?
column6: 5. Do you feel that you are dependent on your smartphone for daily tasks?
column7: 6. How often do you feel the need to check your phone, even when there are no new notifications?
column8: 7. Do you use your smartphone before going to bed?
column9: 8. In your opinion, do you consider yourself addicted to your smartphone?
